verdicts.notes: Independent render of the regenerated VECTOR figure (in-repo generator chime_subband_compare.py, reusing within_chime_test's profiling). 4 rows x 2 cols: johndoeII (left), wilhelm (right) across CHIME sub-bands 0.400-0.480 / 0.507-0.587 / 0.614-0.694 / 0.720-0.800 GHz. Each panel: black baseline-subtracted profile vs time (ms), title carries w_rms and w_tail. johndoeII shows a clear scattered pulse at ~28 ms that tightens toward higher sub-bands (w_rms 1.40 ms at 0.40-0.48 GHz, narrow cores at 0.61-0.69 GHz); wilhelm's TOP 0.40-0.48 GHz panel is empty (w_rms=nan w_tail=nan, flat line at 0.00) as expected for absent data, the lower three sub-bands show the pulse. Pulse arrival consistent across panels, axes/scales sane, annotated widths match the visible widths, no artifacts. Matches expectation.
